summary: SpaceX bondholders are bolstered by a fat equity cushion, high-grade ratings and a relatively small amount of debt outstanding — but they depend on founder Elon Musk, according to Bloomberg Intelligence. “There’s a huge risk there, and the rating agencies have actually pointed this out in terms of governance,” Robert Schiffman, BI senior technology credit analyst, tells Bloomberg News’ James Crombie in this special episode of the Credit Edge podcast. “You’re absolutely on an Elon Musk trip — his

title_cn: 特朗普可能要求最高法院重新考虑拒绝卡罗尔上诉
summary: President Donald Trump may ask the US Supreme Court to reconsider its decision to turn away his appeal of a $5 million verdict against him in E. Jean Carroll’s sexual-abuse lawsuit, her lawyer said in a court filing asking for an immediate payout of the award.

title_cn: 人工智能集会已无路可走
summary: An unsustainable rise in chipmaker stocks is coming to an end just as the artificial-intelligence rally has ticked all the boxes defining a bubble.

title: Cboe Seeks to List Prediction Market Type Options on Earnings Metrics
title_cn: 芝加哥期权交易所寻求列出盈利指标的预测市场类型选项
summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. is seeking US regulatory approval to list all-or-nothing options tied to corporate earnings results, allowing traders to wager on figures ranging from SpaceX revenue and Nvidia data-center sales to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s credit-loss provisions.

title: Hikers Turn to AllTrails App to Navigate Nature
title_cn: 徒步旅行者使用 AllTrails 应用程序探索大自然
summary:
AllTrails CEO Liz Hamren is joined by Bloomberg's Adam Thompson to discuss how to navigate the summer hiking season and break down how to visit the most popular national parks but still beat the crowds. 
Hamren said that a key feature to figuring out the right hike is looking at the latest community input on trail difficulty and conditions that can make a big difference in the experience.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Platforms Getting Into Cloud Infrastructure Business | Closing Bell
title_cn: 元平台进军云基础设施业务|结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Katie Greifeld, Bailey Lipschultz, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chuck E. Cheese CEO Highlights Growth in Birthday Party Business
title_cn: Chuck E. Cheese 首席执行官强调生日派对业务的增长
summary: Scott Drake, CEO of Chuck E. Cheese, discussed the company's strategy to connect with customers through family-friendly, clean, and safe entertainment options. He highlighted the success of the $99 birthday party offering, introduced in 2004, which has driven nearly 40% growth in birthday celebrations. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan's $13 Billion Global Anime Merchandise Goal
title_cn: 日本的全球动漫商品销售额达到 130 亿美元的目标
summary: Anime has become a global entertainment powerhouse, attracting billions of dollars in investment and fans worldwide. Now, companies including Marubeni are targeting the fast-growing $13 billion merchandise market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean Banks Expand Trading Floors for 24-Hour Won Market
title_cn: 韩国银行扩大 24 小时韩元市场交易大厅
summary: South Korea’s biggest lenders are boosting trading desks in London and Seoul to prepare for the won’s round-the-clock trading starting next week.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース

title: REalloys Announces Partnership to Operate on US Army Base
title_cn: REalloys 宣布建立合作伙伴关系，在美国陆军基地开展业务
summary:
REalloys CEO Lipi Sternheim said that members of the US military could be actively involved in working with his company to mine rare earth minerals after the announcement of a deal to let REalloy mine on US Army bases. 
Sternheim said that the partnership with the Army shows how 'strategically important' rare earth metals are to the United States.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging-Market Currencies Erase 2026 Gains as Dollar Advances
title_cn: 随着美元升值，新兴市场货币抹去了 2026 年的涨幅
summary: A gauge for emerging-market currencies fell Wednesday, erasing its gains for this year as speculation over higher US interest rates fueled a resurgence in the dollar.

title: M&A Volume to Stay Strong in Second Half, Says Sullivan’s Sawyer
title_cn: 沙利文的索耶表示下半年并购量将保持强劲
summary: The variety, range and scope of deals in the market suggests transaction volumes will continue to remain strong in the second half, according to Melissa Sawyer, head of global mergers and acquisitions at Sullivan & Cromwell.

title: Golden Seeds Looks to Close the Gender Gap in Startup Investments
title_cn: 金种子希望缩小初创企业投资中的性别差距
summary: Jo Ann Corkran, CEO of Golden Seeds, said that there's been a lot of change in the investment landscape for women entrepreneurs looking for the first buy-in to their companies as Golden Seeds passes $200 million invested in women-led companies. Corkran said that investors are looking for tech companies that could be easily levered, as well as green technology.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Most Stocks Rise as Warsh Says Price Risks Fading: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 沃什称价格风险消退，大多数股票上涨：市场结束
summary: Signs of economic strength alongside easing price pressures lifted most stocks in the US, with Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh saying inflation risks have come down.

title: US Stocks Dip as Traders Weigh Warsh Remarks, Manufacturing Data
title_cn: 由于交易员权衡沃什言论和制造业数据，美国股市下跌
summary: US stocks pared earlier losses on Wednesday as traders assessed fresh economic data and commentary from Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh.

title: The SEC Doesn’t Want to Be in the Biz of Picking ETF Winners
title_cn: SEC 不想参与挑选 ETF 获胜者的业务
summary: The US regulator is rethinking how it oversees the ETF industry

title: Tankmaker KNDS Postpones IPO Citing Market Conditions
title_cn: Tankmaker KNDS 以市场状况为由推迟 IPO
summary: Tankmaker KNDS postponed its initial public offering, halting what was set to be one of Europe’s largest debuts in recent years.

title: Tesla ‘Magic Number’ $420 Sends Musk Bros Piling Into the Stock
title_cn: 特斯拉“神奇数字”420美元促使马斯克兄弟纷纷买入该股
summary: Crossing $420 gets Tesla Inc. investors excited.

title: Telecom Shakeup: Comcast, Verizon Make Deals
title_cn: 电信重组：康卡斯特与威瑞森达成交易
summary: Bloomberg's Michelle Davis joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Verizon and the UK’s BT Group agreed to create a joint venture for their international businesses in a merger that will take the low-margin units off their books and allow the carriers to focus on their home markets. Also, Comcast announced on Monday that it will spin off NBCUniversal and its European media unit, Sky, into a separate, independently traded company. Comcast will hang onto its cable-TV, broadband and wireless businesses.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michael Burry’s Short Call Dents Caterpillar’s AI-Fueled Rally
title_cn: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 的空头看涨削弱了卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar) 人工智能推动的涨势
summary: Caterpillar Inc. stock slid from a record high Wednesday after Michael Burry, made famous in The Big Short for his bets against the US housing market ahead of the 2008 crisis, said he shorted the industrial heavyweight for the first time.

title: Big Bank Calls Unleash Trading Frenzy in US Funding Rate Futures
title_cn: 大银行呼吁释放美国融资利率期货交易狂潮
summary: US short-term interest-rate markets are seeing a surge of activity thanks to top Wall Street banks peddling divergent views on how an expected increase in the supply of Treasury bills this month is likely to play out.

title: Business of Sports: Seahawks for Sale, NBA in Vegas
title_cn: 体育商业：海鹰队出售，NBA 拉斯维加斯
summary: Bloomberg's Randall Williams joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." The first round of bids for the Super Bowl champion Seattle Seahawks — set to be the biggest ever sale for an NFL team — were due Monday. Also former Disney CEO Bob Iger and Thrive Capital founder Joshua Kushner have hired investment bankers and discussed making a bid for the NBA expansion team in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Data Center Build-Out Supports High Valuations: Bilicic
title_cn: 数据中心扩建支持高估值：Bilicic
summary:
Andrew Calder, executive committee member at Kirkland & Ellis, and George Bilicic, managing director and global head of power, energy & infrastructure at Lazard, join Dani Burger and David Carnevali on "Bloomberg Deals."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Rises as Traders Weigh Fed Rate Path After Warsh Remarks
title_cn: 沃什言论后，交易员权衡美联储利率走势，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose as traders weighed the outlook for US monetary policy following Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh’s remarks at an annual central banker gathering.

title: Oil Falls on Growing Signs of Oversupply, Progress in Iran Talks
title_cn: 供应过剩迹象日益明显，伊朗谈判取得进展，油价下跌
summary: Oil extended its run of declines on growing signs of oversupply, with traffic through the Strait of Hormuz recovering and some of the impacts of the Iran war continuing to fade.

title: New Zealand House Prices Near Three-Year Low on Iran War Worries
title_cn: 伊朗战争担忧新西兰房价接近三年低点
summary: New Zealand house prices fell for the third straight month in June, nearing a three-year low and adding to signs of an economic slowdown as the global oil shock hits household incomes and consumer confidence.

title: Dealmakers 'Unlock the Magic' with Care Bears Sale
title_cn: 交易撮合者通过爱心小熊促销“释放魔力”
summary: Jeff Collins, Managing Partner at Cloverlay, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." IVEST Consumer Partners and Cloverlay announced the sale of Care Bears to Authentic Brands Group. They discuss the deal and the value of intellectual property. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Shell Shuffles Energy Trading Bosses as David Wells Retires
title_cn: 大卫·威尔斯退休后，壳牌对能源贸易老板进行了洗牌
summary: Shell Plc Executive Vice President of energy trading David Wells is retiring after four years of running a unit that’s a key driver for the company’s earnings, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: M&A Environment Healthy: Top M&A Firm
title_cn: 健康的并购环境：顶级并购公司
summary: Melissa Sawyer, global head of M&A Sullivan & Cromwell, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Global transaction values were up around 30% year over year to $2.6 trillion in the first half, according to data compiled by Bloomberg. That puts dealmakers on course to potentially set a record. Sullivan & Cromwell is ranked number one by market share and deal value so far in 2026, according to the league table on the Bloomberg terminal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robinhood Rolls Out Perpetual Futures Tied to Commodities, ETFs
title_cn: Robinhood 推出与大宗商品、ETF 挂钩的永续期货
summary: Robinhood Markets Inc. is rolling out perpetual futures tied to commodities, exchange-traded funds and currencies in Europe, seeking to capitalize on the rise in round-the-clock trading that’s long been a feature of crypto markets.

title: Apple Seeks to Buy Chinese-Made Memory Chips by Lobbying US
title_cn: 苹果试图通过游说美国购买中国制造的存储芯片
summary: Apple Inc. is in negotiations to purchase chips from two Chinese semiconductor makers on a Pentagon blacklist to help reduce the impact of a global memory shortage that’s forced the company to raise prices across its product line.

title: Alibaba, Payment Firm Will Pay $600 Million to Resolve US Probe
title_cn: 阿里巴巴和支付公司将支付 6 亿美元解决美国调查
summary: Chinese tech giant Alibaba Group Holding Ltd and its US digital payment processor agreed to pay $600 million to resolve a federal investigation into whether they failed to prevent the sale and importation of illegal pharmaceuticals and controlled substances, the Justice Department said.

title: Nuclear Firm First in US to Produce Power From Advanced Reactor
title_cn: 美国第一家利用先进反应堆发电的核公司
summary: Valar Atomics Inc., a California-based nuclear startup, generated power from an advanced reactor to run an Nvidia Corp. AI chip. While just a trickle of electricity was produced, it’s the first time a next-gen reactor has done so in the US.

title: One Leveraged ETF Is Reshaping Trading in World's Top AI Memory Stock
title_cn: 一只杠杆 ETF 正在重塑全球顶级人工智能存储股票的交易
summary: A Hong Kong fund tied to SK Hynix has grown so large that it's beginning to move the stock it was built to track.

title: AI Money and Anxiety Are Powering This Election Cycle
title_cn: 人工智能货币和焦虑正在推动这个选举周期
summary: AI is sparking nervousness among voters. AI money is funding the candidates. And AI is generating the campaign ads. On today’s Big Take podcast, how the first AI election mirrors the anxieties of our era.

title: ByteDance construye en Brasil su mayor complejo de centros de datos fuera de China
title_cn: 字节跳动在巴西建设中国以外最大的数据中心综合体
summary: El centro de datos de US$39.000 millones del creador de TikTok es el fruto más reciente de los esfuerzos de Lula por atraer inversión china.

title: Apple Readies New iPad Pro, Redesigned Entry MacBook Pro for 2027
title_cn: Apple 准备推出 2027 年新款 iPad Pro 和重新设计的入门级 MacBook Pro
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing an upgraded iPad Pro line and a redesigned entry-level MacBook Pro for next year, adding to a slate of several other major new products planned for the iPhone’s 20th anniversary year.

title: Northern Ireland Riots Stoked by Social Media Accounts From US, UK
title_cn: 美国、英国社交媒体账户引发北爱尔兰骚乱
summary: Researchers found that 30% of accounts that amplified inflammatory statements in days after knife attack were based in the US.

title: Musk Ally Gracias Eyes Bets in AI, Energy After SpaceX Windfall
title_cn: 继 SpaceX 意外之财后，马斯克盟友格雷西亚斯着眼于人工智能和能源领域
summary: Antonio Gracias, a long-time SpaceX board member, is looking for more investments in artificial intelligence, energy and space after bets in Elon Musk’s company netted his fund nearly $100 billion.

title: What the Saga Over Anthropic’s Mythos Tells Us About the Cyber Risks From AI
title_cn: 关于人类神话的传奇故事告诉我们关于人工智能的网络风险
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its Mythos artificial intelligence model is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant has released Mythos to a small number of partner organizations because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic said, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: Bloomberg Deals 7/1/2026
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: Sullivan & Cromwell Global head of M&A Melissa Sawyer, Cloverlay Managing Partner Jeff Collins, Lazard Managing Director George Bilicic, Kirkland & Ellis Executive Committee Member Andre Calder, and PC Partners Credit Founder Ted Goldthorpe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: We're Looking at Smaller Firms: BC's Goldthorpe
title_cn: 我们正在寻找较小的公司：BC 省的 Goldthorpe
summary: Ted Goldthorpe, founder of BC Partners Credit, joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." They discuss potential consolidation among dealmaking firms, dry powder and the business of sports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AOL Owner Bending Spoons Jumps After $1.68 Billion IPO
title_cn: AOL 所有者 Bending Spoon 首次公开募股 16.8 亿美元后股价飙升
summary:
Bending Spoons SpA shares rose 14% above their initial public offering price after the company and some of its backers raised $1.68 billion. 
Shares of the Milan, Italy-based company, which acquires struggling software businesses, opened on Wednesday at $31 each, above the IPO price of $29 per share, before climbing as high as $33.14. The firm and investors including Baillie Gifford sold 57.97 million shares after marketing them for $26 to $28.  Luca Ferrari, CEO, Bending Spoons joined Bailey Lipschultz, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec from to discuss their first day of trading.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Giant Cable Exposes Ireland’s AI Ambitions and Security Risks
title_cn: 一根巨型电缆暴露了爱尔兰的人工智能野心和安全风险
summary: A new Amazon transatlantic fiber-optic link is symbolic of the country’s tech economy, but also of its chronic lack of defense spending.

title: The Race to Build Data Centers in Space (Correct)
title_cn: 太空数据中心建设竞赛（正确）
summary: “Data centers in space” may sound like science fiction, but as the SpaceX IPO augurs a space boom, tech giants and startups are betting orbital artificial intelligence is the next frontier. (Corrects reference to 16-square-kilometer solar array at 3:26 in video originally published on June 15.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta to Build Cloud Business to Sell Excess AI Compute | Bloomberg Tech 7/01/2026
title_cn: Meta 建立云业务以出售多余的人工智能计算 |彭博科技 7/01/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down Meta's plans to develop its own cloud infrastructure business aimed at selling access to AI computing power and models. Plus, the Trump administration lifts foreign access restrictions on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model. And, Lime CEO Wayne Ting joins as the company gets ready to debut on the Nasdaq. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What’s Behindthe US Dollar’s “Explosive” Rally?
title_cn: 美元“爆发式”上涨的背后是什么？
summary: Just months ago, investors were selling the dollar against the euro to Bitcoin and gold. Now the dollar is rallying. So what’s changed? Ruth Carson explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Power Crunch Has Investors Seeking Next IPO Winners
title_cn: 人工智能电力紧缩让投资者寻找下一个 IPO 获胜者
summary: The artificial intelligence boom has a power problem, and Wall Street is betting billions on companies that promise to solve it — even if some of the technology hasn’t been fully developed yet.

title: Marlinspike Raises New Fund to Back Defense, Industrial Startups
title_cn: Marlinspike 筹集新资金支持国防和工业初创企业
summary: Marlinspike Partners just raised an oversubscribed $127 million Fund II to "rearm America," the latest sign that investors are piling into defense startups. Marlinspike co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, who also served six years as a US Navy Surface Warfare Officer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber-Backed Lime Raises $174 Million in Public Debut
title_cn: Uber 支持的 Lime 首次公开募资 1.74 亿美元
summary: The IPO window is showing more signs of life, with Uber-backed Lime raising $174 million in its public debut, pricing its shares right at the midpoint of the expected range. Lime CEO Wayne Ting says the company is going public to attract new investors, and is thinking about M&A, though "the bar is high." He joins Ed Ludlow from the Nasdaq on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Lifts Export Restrictions on Anthropic's Fable 5
title_cn: 美国取消对《Anthropic》《神鬼寓言5》的出口限制
summary: The Trump administration has lifted foreign access restrictions on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model after the company addressed government safety concerns. Allie Mellen, principal analyst at Forrester, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss how Washington regulates frontier AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Limits on Anthropic’s Mythos Keep Foreign Firms in Limbo
title_cn: 美国对人类神话的限制使外国公司陷入困境
summary: Foreign governments, companies and financial institutions were left in limbo after the Trump administration continued to restrict access to Anthropic PBC’s Mythos 5 to a limited number of US organizations even after dropping export controls on the company’s latest artificial intelligence models.

title: Inside Meta’s $900 Million India Gamble
title_cn: Meta 在印度豪赌 9 亿美元的内幕
summary: Meta has appointed CRED founder Kunal Shah to help lead WhatsApp globally as it tries to turn the app into a financial powerhouse. Bloomberg Opinion’s Andy Mukherjee explains why India is the key to that strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Equity Bets on AI Growth
title_cn: 私募股权押注人工智能增长
summary: Eric Liu, the Co-Head of Private Capital at EQT, joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how AI is reshaping private equity investing, why software companies face a growing divide between AI winners and losers, and how his firm manages regulatory risk in technology and healthcare. He also shares why high-quality assets continue to trade despite a slower private equity exit market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Wealth: Rick Wurster
title_cn: 彭博财富：里克·沃斯特
summary: Charles Schwab has grown from a small discount brokerage into one of the largest financial services firms in the world. In this week's episode of Bloomberg Wealth, President and CEO Rick Wurster joins David Rubenstein to discuss the company's 50-year mission of making investing more accessible, how Schwab now oversees $13 trillion in client assets, and why he believes long-term investing continues to outperform trying to time the market. Wurster also shares leadership lessons from Schwab himself, and explains how the firm is navigating the future of investing. This interview was recorded May 1 in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: National Grid's Big Bet on US AI Power Firm
title_cn: 国家电网大举押注美国人工智能电力公司
summary: National Grid CEO Zoë Yujnovich discusses the company's strategic $1.75 billion investment in Jouleant, a US-based AI power firm, emphasizing the growing importance of AI-driven electricity demand. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WhatsApp’s New Feature Has Defenses Against Scams, Meta Says
title_cn: Meta 称 WhatsApp 的新功能可防御诈骗
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. said Wednesday it’ll allow high-profile names to be only claimed by legitimate owners as part of its effort to counter impersonation on WhatsApp’s new username feature.

title: Trump’s Nuclear Watchdog to Ditch 50-Year-Old Radiation Guidance
title_cn: 特朗普的核监管机构将放弃已有 50 年历史的辐射指南
summary: The US Nuclear Regulatory Commission plans to scrap guidance on radiation exposure for power plant workers that’s been in place since the mid-1970s.

title: Trump Hails Qatar Meetings on Iran as Talks Set to Continue
title_cn: 特朗普称赞卡塔尔就伊朗问题举行的会议将继续进行
summary: US President Donald Trump said negotiators had made progress in indirect talks with Iran, as the two countries seek to move past last week’s tit-for-tat strikes and convert their interim truce into a lasting peace.

title: DHS Secretary Says Haiti, Syria Migrants Must Self-Deport Now
title_cn: 国土安全部部长表示海地和叙利亚移民现在必须自行驱逐出境
summary: Haitians and Syrians who lost Temporary Protected Status under last week’s Supreme Court ruling have no legal path to remain in the US and must leave now or face forced removal, Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said.

title: US Decides Against Renewing USMCA, Shifting to Rolling Talks
title_cn: 美国决定不再续签USMCA，转向滚动谈判
summary: The US won’t renew its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact in a decision that risks adding uncertainty for companies producing goods across North America.

title: Warsh Signals Optimism on US Growth Potential |Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 7/1/2026
title_cn: 沃什表示对美国增长潜力持乐观态度 |《彭博商业周刊》日报 7/1/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg's Mike McKee discusses comments made by Kevin Warsh about the direction the Fed will take under his leadership. Then Bloomberg campaign finance reporter Bill Allison breaks down the billions in crypto investments revealed in President Trump's annual financial disclosure. Plus, REAlloys CEO Lipi Sternheim discusses his company's partnership with the US government to mine rare earths on US army bases. Finally, Bending Spoons CEO Luca Ferrari is joined by Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz to discuss the web company's $1.68 billion IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Draws Parallels to Roosevelt During US 250th Anniversary Celebrations
title_cn: 特朗普在美国建国250周年庆典期间将其与罗斯福相提并论
summary: President Donald Trump linked himself to the legacy of Theodore Roosevelt, a swashbuckling Republican predecessor, despite stark policy differences, at an event Wednesday in North Dakota.

title: Why Trump Is Both a Boost and a Burden for Republicans
title_cn: 为什么特朗普对共和党来说既是推动也是负担
summary: The president is downplaying cost of living concerns that polls show are vexing Americans.

title: California’s Return to Office Mandate for 90,000 State Workers Sets Up Union Clash
title_cn: 加州要求 9 万名州政府工作人员重返办公室引发工会冲突
summary: The pandemic-era workweek is finally coming to an end for tens of thousands of California state workers.

title: Vance Says US Is Worried About 'Nuclear Issue' With Iran
title_cn: 万斯表示美国担心与伊朗的“核问题”
summary: The US is “worried about the nuclear issue” and will “start talking about that” with Iran, Vice President JD Vance says. He says talks with Iran in Doha are going very well, but it's also "still pretty early." He spoke to reporters in Virginia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Sanctions Two Brazilians, Four Firms Linked to Drug Cartel
title_cn: 美国制裁两名巴西人和四家与贩毒集团有关的公司
summary: The US Treasury Department sanctioned two Brazilian nationals, three Brazilian companies and one Portuguese company for allegedly helping launder proceeds for Latin America’s largest criminal organization.

title: Iran Wraps Up Doha Meetings | Balance of Power 7/1/2026
title_cn: 伊朗结束多哈会议|权力平衡 7/1/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Rebelle Communications Founder Laura Fink, Push Digital Vice President T.W. Arrighi, former Republican Congressman Patrick McHenry and National Association of Manufacturers President Jay Timmons. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-CIA Director Brennan Alleges ‘Vindictive’ DOJ Criminal Probe
title_cn: 前中央情报局局长布伦南声称司法部刑事调查具有“报复性”
summary: Former CIA Director John Brennan sued the Trump administration, asking a federal judge to ensure government records are preserved in case he’s criminally indicted so he can seek to prove the charges are “vindictive.”

title: US Aluminum Smelter Idled Since 2024 to Restart as Trump Looks to Revive Industry
title_cn: 特朗普希望重振工业，自 2024 年以来闲置的美国铝冶炼厂将重新启动
summary: An idled aluminum smelter in Missouri will restart production before the end of this year, helping to boost output of the metal amid the Trump administration’s push to revive the domestic industry.

title: US Decides Against Renewing USMCA, Shifting to Rolling Talks
title_cn: 美国决定不再续签USMCA，转向滚动谈判
summary:
The US decided against renewing its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact in a move that risks adding uncertainty for companies producing goods across North America.
The US-Mexico-Canada Agreement, or USMCA, will remain in force for another a decade provided no one country decides to exit. Annual reviews instead of a longer-term renewal open the door to years of contentious negotiations. Bloomberg National Security Reporter Nick Wadhams says this change is because Trump wants to change the deal.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Agents Nab Member of Group That Brought Hasan Piker to Cuba
title_cn: 美国特工抓获将哈桑·皮克带到古巴的组织成员
summary: A Cuban national accused of being part of a sprawling influence network that brought US political streamer Hasan Piker to Havana has been detained along with his family and will be deported.

title: UN, Strapped for Cash, Warns Time Running Out to Make Payments
title_cn: 现金短缺的联合国警告付款时间已所剩无几
summary: The United Nations only has enough funds to operate through the end of August, according to the official in charge of its budget, as major contributors including the US and China have yet to pay what they owe in full.

title: Slovakia to Revive Aluminum Plant That Was Once a Top Producer
title_cn: 斯洛伐克将重振曾经是顶级生产商的铝厂
summary: Slovakia is set to revive primary aluminum production at a plant that was once one of Europe’s biggest producers of the metal.

title: US Won't Renew USMCA Trade Deal
title_cn: 美国不会续签USMCA贸易协议
summary: The US decided against renewing its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact. That's according to US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer, who spoke to Bloomberg News on Wednesday. The USMCA will stay in tact for another decade, unless a country decides to exit. Bloomberg's Jeff Mason reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: USDA to Fund $500 Million to ‘Fast Track’ Fertilizer Plants
title_cn: 美国农业部将资助 5 亿美元用于“快速通道”化肥厂
summary: The US Department of Agriculture will invest $500 million in new and existing fertilizer facilities to “fast track” more production in America, Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins said in a press conference Wednesday.

title: Asylum Seekers Sue Over ICE Requiring More Tracking Devices
title_cn: 寻求庇护者起诉 ICE 要求更多追踪设备
summary: A group of migrants seeking US asylum or visas is suing over a new Trump administration policy requiring them to wear tracking monitors as an alternative to detention, claiming the measure is causing unnecessary harm to people trying to remain in the country legally.

title: US Sees 10 Million Barrels Via Hormuz Sapping Iran Oil Leverage
title_cn: 美国通过霍尔木兹海峡运输1000万桶石油，削弱伊朗石油杠杆
summary: Commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has surged over the past few weeks, with American military support helping boost oil flows to more than 10 million barrels per day, a US official said.

title: House Speaker Asks Trump to Let Jones Act Shipping Waiver Expire
title_cn: 众议院议长要求特朗普让琼斯法案航运豁免到期
summary: Speaker Mike Johnson and other Republicans in the US House of Representatives are asking President Donald Trump to allow a waiver of a century-old shipping law granted in March to tame fuel prices to expire.

title: Ships Cross Hormuz in Convoy Formation as Gulf Oil Keeps Flowing
title_cn: 海湾石油持续流动，船只组成护航队穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Two large convoys of commercial ships were observed crossing the Strait of Hormuz, one of the clearest examples yet of what appears to be an increasingly common navigational tactic to keep maritime traffic safe.

title: White House Adds Pandemic Response Staff as Ebola Cases Rise
title_cn: 随着埃博拉病例上升，白宫增加了流行病应对人员
summary: The Trump administration brought on two new pandemic response officials at the White House as the administration faces multiple infectious disease threats, a White House spokesperson confirmed.

title: Colombia’s Incoming Finance Minister Pledges Fiscal Austerity
title_cn: 哥伦比亚新​​任财政部长承诺财政紧缩
summary: Colombia’s incoming finance minister is pledging to implement tighter fiscal policy, warning that the nation’s budget deficit is significantly wider than official figures suggest.

title: Trump Personnel Office Looks to Crack Down on Agencies’ Staffing
title_cn: 特朗普人事办公室希望打击机构人员配置
summary: A proposal from the Office of Personnel Management would tighten oversight of agencies’ staffing plans and eliminate diversity language in federal hiring.

title: Ukraine’s Missiles Now Have Almost Half of Russia in Reach
title_cn: 乌克兰的导弹现在几乎可以到达俄罗斯的一半
summary: Ukraine has expanded the range and intensity of its missile strikes inside Russia, triggering alerts across nearly half of the regions in the world’s largest country so far this year.
